name: Easy Crockpot Beef Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Chuck or other cut beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the onion, garlic, carrots, and celery to the crockpot.
2. Place the meat on top of the vegetables.
3. Add the Worcestershire sauce, Kitchen Bouquet, and dry soup mix.
4. Pour the stewed tomatoes over the top.
5. Cook on Low heat for 7 hours.
6. Turn off the heat and add the mushrooms (if using). Let it cook for an additional hour or so.
7. Remove the meat from the crockpot.
8. If a thicker gravy is desired, stir in 2 tablespoons of flour and set the crockpot to High while stirring for a minute or two.
9. Serve with rice or noodles. Alternatively, add cut-up potatoes with the vegetables.
